overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban downtown. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses a multi-lane intersection with steam vents, and walks under an elevated highway surrounded by towering buildings with holographic advertisements.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to tall commercial buildings, approaching an intersection

entered.detail: blue street sign indicating Berkeley Ave mounted on a pole
large advertisement for Nicola soda on the side of a building
dark facade building with large vertical windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a city sidewalk next to a dark commercial building. A blue Berkeley Ave street sign and a large Nicola soda billboard are visible across the street. Sparse pedestrians walk in both directions as the character approaches the intersection.

events.description: steps off sidewalk onto crosswalk entering the intersection
vehicles pass through the intersection as the character crosses

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane intersection, navigating around steam vents rising from the street

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: steam rising from vents in the street surface
yellow-trimmed elevated highway ramp crossing above the street
yellow and white painted lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide urban intersection with visible steam vents rising from the ground. The elevated highway structure becomes prominent in the distance while vehicles drive through the crossing. The character navigates across the asphalt crosswalk as the surrounding buildings open up to reveal the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza area beneath elevated highway

events.description: camera pans upward to look at the towering buildings and elevated highway
flying vehicle passes overhead in the distance

agents.ego_description: traversing the open intersection area while looking up at the architecture and advertisements

entered.detail: large vertical holographic advertisement for El Guapo with cybernetic figure
tall glass and steel towers with various advertisements

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open plaza, the character looks up at the massive El Guapo holographic billboard and surrounding futuristic skyscrapers. The elevated highway looms closer overhead while steam vents drift to the left. A flying vehicle passes high above the buildings.

events.description: enters the covered area beneath the elevated highway structure
moving from bright sunlight into the shadow of the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway, passing other pedestrians and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: illuminated digital posters on the building walls
palm trees visible in the distance down the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath the massive elevated highway structure into a semi-covered walkway. The lighting shifts to mixed shadows as digital advertisement screens illuminate the right side. Palm trees become visible in the distance as the character continues forward under the overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense futuristic downtown that transitions from a narrow commercial sidewalk into the cavernous shadow of an elevated highway. It begins beside a dark building and a blue Berkeley Ave street sign, moving past a Nicola soda billboard as the character approaches a busy intersection. As the character enters the wide crossing, the view opens up to reveal the sky and distant highway structures while steam vents rise from the asphalt. The scene then expands into an open plaza, where the camera tilts upward toward massive skyscrapers and a towering El Guapo holographic billboard as a flying vehicle passes overhead. Finally, the character moves beneath the massive overpass into a semi-covered walkway, where the lighting shifts into deep shadows illuminated by digital screens and distant palm trees.
